_comment: Rule-based pre-filter scoring config. Adjust weights here without touching scripts.

bizdeedz_keyword_match.description: At least one BizDeedz keyword cluster matched

turea_keyword_match.description: At least one Turea keyword cluster matched

pain_phrase_match.description: At least one pain/problem phrase matched

priority_source.description: Signal came from a priority subreddit or high-priority RSS feed

high_engagement.description: Reddit post has above-threshold upvotes or comment count

ai_score_labels.3: Moderate - some relevance but no clear action
ai_score_labels.4: Strong signal - clear relevance and potential action
ai_score_labels.5: High-value signal - directly actionable or highly relevant
